ddls:
CREATE TABLE "fault_points" (
  "point_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each fault point */,
  "motherset" TEXT /* Type of fault (e.g., fault, fracture) */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Class of the fault (e.g., multiclass) */,
  "original_label" INTEGER /* Label assigned in the original dataset */,
  "diff_score" REAL /* Difference score from threshold measurements */,
  "ground_truth" TEXT /* Ground truth classification of the fault */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the fault point is located */,
  "classification_date" TEXT /* Date when the fault point was last classified */,
  "last_observation_date" TEXT /* Date of the last observation */,
  "last_analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the last analysis */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the fault point is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fault_points_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fault_points_ground_truth FOREIGN KEY ("ground_truth") REFERENCES fault_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fault_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the fault class (e.g., nominal, anomaly) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fault class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region */,
  "last_seismic_event_date" TEXT /* Date of the last significant seismic event in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliated institution or company */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher's role */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the researcher's last login to the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researchers_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fault_observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "point_id" TEXT /* ID of the fault point being observed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher making the observation */,
  "observation_date" TEXT /* Date of the observation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the observation */,
  "observation_type" TEXT /* Type of observation (e.g., visual, instrumental) */,
  "is_confirmed" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the observation is confirmed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fault_observations_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fault_observations_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("point_id") REFERENCES fault_points ("point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seismic_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seismic event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., earthquake, tremor) */,
  "magnitude" REAL /* Magnitude of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the event occurred */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth of the seismic event */,
  "impact_assessment" TEXT /* Assessment of the event's impact on fault points */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fault_event_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "point_id" TEXT /* ID of the fault point */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seismic event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fault_event_links_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES seismic_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fault_event_links_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("point_id") REFERENCES fault_points ("point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., satellite, field measurements) */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update from the data source */,
  "reliability_score" REAL /* Reliability score of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fault_data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "point_id" TEXT /* ID of the fault point */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the fault data */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of changes in this version */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the version change */,
  "version_creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if this is the current version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fault_data_versions_version_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fault_data_versions_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("point_id") REFERENCES fault_points ("point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fault_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "point_id" TEXT /* ID of the fault point analyzed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was conducted */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the analysis result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fault_analysis_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("point_id") REFERENCES fault_points ("point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with this role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity in the system */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
